summary: Tested FiscalDataDrawer bug fix - 'Continuar' button in drawer now works correctly. Bug was: frontend sent null for phone/email, backend expected strings. Fix applied: phone:'' and email:email.trim()||'' instead of null values. All 7 backend tests passed, UI flow completed successfully.

issues: Minor: React warning about nested buttons in customer pill (HTML validation - button inside button)

passed_tests: POST /api/customers with empty strings for phone and email - 200 OK
POST /api/customers with optional email provided - 200 OK
UI: Login -> Payment Screen -> NCF -> B01 -> FiscalDataDrawer -> Enter RNC -> Search -> Enter Razón Social -> Continuar - NO ERROR
UI: New customer created with empty strings for phone/email - verified in database
critical_code_review_comments: FIX VERIFIED: FiscalDataDrawer.jsx lines 247-248 now send empty strings instead of null for email and phone
Backend CustomerInput model accepts empty strings (phone: str = '', email: str = '') - correct
Minor HTML issue: PaymentScreen.js has nested button elements (button inside button) causing React warning

bug_verified_fixed.original_bug: Frontend sent null for phone and email when creating new customer via saveNewCustomer()
bug_verified_fixed.fix_applied: Changed phone: null to phone: '' and email: email.trim() || null to email: email.trim() || ''
verification: Backend API test: POST /api/customers with empty strings returns 200 OK
UI test: Full flow Login -> B01 -> Fiscal Drawer -> Continuar completes without 422 error
Database verified: Customer 'Empresa Test Playwright Bug Fix' created with phone='' and email=''

seed_data_creation: Created test customers during testing (cleaned up in backend tests, 1 left from UI test: 'Empresa Test Playwright Bug Fix' with RNC 101985888)
context_for_next_testing_agent: FiscalDataDrawer bug fix verified. The drawer now correctly sends empty strings for phone and email fields when creating new customers for fiscal types B01, B14, B15. All CRUD operations on /api/customers work correctly with empty string values.

rca_of_the_issue.bug_type: Type mismatch - null vs empty string
rca_of_the_issue.description: The saveNewCustomer function was sending null values for phone and email fields, but the backend Pydantic model CustomerInput expected string types (even empty strings). This caused HTTP 422 Unprocessable Entity errors when clicking 'Continuar'.
rca_of_the_issue.fix_applied: Lines 247-248: Changed phone: null to phone: '' and email: email.trim() || null to email: email.trim() || ''
rca_of_the_issue.verification: After fix, clicking Continuar creates customer successfully and closes drawer
